headline: CDL’s $2.29 annual dividend beats Treasury yields despite rising interest rates
summary: Income investors holding the VictoryShares US Large Cap High Div Volatility Wtd ETF (NYSEARCA:CDL) own a fund built around one premise: large American companies with stable share prices tend to pay reliable dividends. CDL distributes cash monthly and paid $2.29 per share in 2025 against a current share price of roughly $76. With Treasury yields ... headline: These 3 Utility Stocks Have Been Paying Dividends for Decades and AI Data Centers Just Made Them More Valuable
summary: Wages fluctuate. Bonuses get cut. Side hustles burn out. Dividend income, by contrast, lands in a brokerage account on a schedule the holder did not negotiate and a boss cannot revoke. For investors building a portfolio that pays them regardless of what the broader market is doing in any given week, regulated utilities remain one ... These 3 Utility Stocks Have Been Paying Dividends for Decades and AI Data Centers Just Made Them More Valuable

headline: Is Duke Energy (DUK) Pricing Look Stretched After Recent Share Gains?
summary: If you are wondering whether Duke Energy's current share price reflects its true worth, the recent performance gives you plenty to think about. The stock last closed at US$123.81, with the price down 0.1% over the past week and down 3.2% over the past month, while still showing a 5.4% gain year to date and a 10.0% return over the last year. These moves have come alongside ongoing attention on US utilities, with investors focusing on how power providers are positioned for long term...
